changed_files.change: Removed one redundant f-string prefix from a print literal without changing emitted text.
Added the P4.6.3 soft-tool adoption report.
Added the machine-readable P4.6.3 soft-tool baseline.

soft_check_results.name: ruff_check
soft_check_results.summary: 67 findings after one safe lint fix: F401=1, E402=63, F841=3.

soft_check_results.name: ruff_format_check
soft_check_results.summary: 111 files would be reformatted and 24 files were already formatted; broad formatting is out of scope for P4.6.3.

soft_check_results.name: mypy
soft_check_results.summary: mypy stopped on duplicate module mapping for scripts/audit_session.py as both audit_session and scripts.audit_session.

soft_check_results.name: vulture
soft_check_results.summary: 5 candidates: app/rules/risk_rules.py previous_status and test fake kwargs in test_p0_hybrid_rag.py/test_p0_turn_extractor.py.

soft_check_results.name: radon_cc
soft_check_results.summary: 657 blocks analyzed; average complexity A (4.537290715372907). Historical high-complexity blocks remain advisory.

soft_check_results.name: deptry
soft_check_results.summary: 6 dependency findings: 2 missing langchain split packages and 4 possibly unused runtime dependencies.

safe_fixes_applied.change: Removed a redundant f-string prefix from a print literal without changing the emitted text.

reverted_candidate_fixes.change: Restored DEFAULT_DB_PATH import after validation showed scripts/run_case_corpus_eval.py imports it as a compatibility entrypoint.

safe_fix_now.details: scripts/filter_sft_manual_only.py had an f-string without placeholders; the f prefix was removed.

keep_with_reason.details: app/api/sqlite_store.py re-exports DEFAULT_DB_PATH for scripts/run_case_corpus_eval.py; removing it broke unittest. Keep until a compatibility migration is approved.
Most E402 findings are caused by sys.path/bootstrap ordering in executable scripts. Reordering imports could change direct CLI behavior.

caution_review_later.details: 111 files would be reformatted; do not run broad formatting in P4.6.3.
mypy needs package-base/configuration review; avoid adding Any or structural package changes in this phase.
Vulture candidates may be test fake signatures or semantic placeholders; review individually before edits.
Radon exits 0 but reports historical high-complexity functions. Function splitting is out of scope.
Deptry findings touch runtime requirements and LangChain compatibility; do not change requirements.txt in P4.6.3.

risky_do_not_touch.details: TurnOutput, RunState, FinalReport, FastAPI response schema, and SQLite schema remain unchanged.
Risk rule behavior remains unchanged; do not remove vulture-reported variables without semantic review.
Legacy, gate, SFT, and RAG compatibility imports/entrypoints remain in place.
Mojibake/user-visible Chinese literals were not repaired in this phase.

unchanged_contracts: FastAPI API contract and response schema
known_cautions: Soft checks are advisory and remain non-blocking.
ruff check still reports 67 historical findings.
ruff format would reformat 111 files and was not applied.
mypy needs package-base configuration before meaningful type checking can proceed.
deptry findings touch runtime dependency compatibility and were not applied.
P4 gate still emits the existing transformers/PyTorch version warning.
Captured test output may contain existing mojibake.
risky_items_not_touched: TurnOutput, RunState, and FinalReport fields and semantics
FastAPI API contract and response body semantics
SQLite schema and historical session compatibility
user-visible Chinese literals and existing mojibake candidates

next_recommended_phase.name: P4.6.4 Structural Cleanup
items: Prefer narrowly scoped shared helpers over broad formatting or mass refactors.
Keep all runtime contracts, compatibility entrypoints, and risk semantics frozen.
Validate any structural change through code-health gate, P4 gate, unittest, and compileall.
